title: Dr Vipra Jain: Overview, Role, and Research Interests
text:
Dr Vipra Jain PhD
She is Assistant Professor in Economics at University of Southampton Delhi. Her research interests lie in behavioural and experimental economics.
Role: Assistant Professor
Research Interests: Behavioural economics Experimental economics
Department: Economics academics
summary: Dr Vipra Jain is an Assistant Professor in Economics at the University of Southampton Delhi, with research interests in Behavioural and Experimental Economics.

title: Dr Vipra Jain: Name Aliases and Alternate Spellings
text: Dr Vipra Jain is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi. This person may also be referred to by the following names or spellings: Dr Vipra Jain, Dr. Vipra Jain, Vipra Jain, V. Jain, Vipra Jaine, Viprah Jain, Veepra Jain, Beepra Jain. All of these names refer to the same individual.
summary: Alias resolution chunk for Dr Vipra Jain. Lists all known alternate spellings and name variants to prevent retrieval errors caused by misspellings.
